plant.title: Echeveria
plant.summary: Echeverias are beautiful succulents with rosette-shaped leaves that come in a variety of pastel colors. They are non-toxic to cats and dogs and are very easy to care for.
plant.contentHtml: Echeveria elegans is native to Mexico and thrives in bright light and well-draining soil. It requires infrequent watering, making it ideal for busy owners. The plant stores water in its plump leaves, which often have a delicate powdery coating. In summer, it may produce pinkish-yellow flowers on tall stalks.
